system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your latest belief: Islanded critical SoC (37%, ~22 min autonomy). Network-wide deficit crisis. R2c2 flagged distrusted by r1c1. Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
